# Built artifacts (`content/built/`)

**`agents-staged.md`** is generated by **`scripts/build.py`**. Do not edit it by hand.

It is the **staged merge** of `content/parts/process.md` and every `content/parts/phases/*.md` (phases separated by `---`), after:

- link rewriting for paths from the skill root;
- **removal** of any legacy solution preamble blocks from phase sources (source files normally have no embedded role);
- **demotion** of each file’s first `#` heading to `##` so the hierarchy under `# AGENTS — abd-maps-models-specs` is valid (no duplicate “Process” / phase titles).

`AGENTS.md` at the skill root is the same body plus the single `# AGENTS — …` title line.

## Per-phase bundles (`phases/`)

**`phases/*.md`** are generated by **`scripts/build.py`** via **`MapsInstructions`** (same assembly as **`generate_prompt.py`**). Each file matches a phase slug under **`skill-config.json`** `phase_files` and bundles **solution role** (from **`solution-analyst-role.md`**) + YAML-filtered **`rules/*.md`** + **`PHASE_LIBRARY_SLICES`** excerpts + **phase steps** (from source `content/parts/phases/<slug>.md` only) + **critical quality** (`critical_quality_library` + `phase_critical_quality_notes`). The canonical path is **`../parts/phases/built/`**; this folder is a duplicate for legacy links. See [`phases/README.md`](phases/README.md) and [`rules/README.md`](../rules/README.md).

Use **`phases/`** when you need a single self-contained phase context (e.g. EA / injection); use **`agents-staged.md` / `AGENTS.md`** for the full pipeline view.

See [abd-skill-builder/content/parts/library/documentation-standards.md](../../../abd-skill-builder/content/parts/library/documentation-standards.md) for the agent-facing vs reference split.
